data.solution:
I can process information and respond to your requests. This includes:

*   **Answering questions:** I can provide information on a wide range of topics.
*   **Generating text:** I can write stories, poems, code, scripts, musical pieces, email, letters, etc.
*   **Translating languages:** I can translate text between different languages.
*   **Summarizing text:** I can condense long pieces of text into shorter summaries.
*   **Explaining concepts:** I can break down complex ideas into simpler terms.
*   **Brainstorming ideas:** I can help you come up with creative solutions or concepts.
*   **And much more!**

Just tell me what you need.
